It contains no external data handling, no network activity, no obfuscation, and no malicious patterns.  \n- The bytecode appears to be typical compiled contract code, not obfuscated or suspicious.  \n- The functions are purely for deployment and connection, with no data leaks or security vulnerabilities.\n\n### **Recommended Scores:**\n\n- **Malware:** 0  \n- **Obfuscated:** 0  \n- **Risk:** 0 (since there's no external data handling, no vulnerabilities, and the code is boilerplate)\n\n---\n\n**Summary:**\n\n| Score Type       | Final Recommendation |\n|------------------|----------------------|\n| Malware          | 0                    |\n| Obfuscated       | 0                    |\n| Security Risk    | 0                    |\n\nThis assessment aligns with the detailed analysis and the nature of the code provided.",
